text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Rumble!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So many fans are watching me!<n>That's why!
That's why!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I have to run toward them!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's Agnes Digital! Agnes Digital is<n>dashing across
this unconventional<n>track as the rain pours down
around<n>her! She's going, going, and...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She's crossed the finish line! What<n>an irrefutable
finish! Agnes Digital<n>has won the autumn Tenno
Sho!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Pant... Wheeze... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ooohhh?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: WHOOOOOAAAAA!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: OHHHMMMMYYYYYY!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Yeeeaaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: GH! GH! GH!<n>GHHHRRRAAARRRHHHH!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: WOOOOO!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital screams, possessed by<n>exhilaration.
The joy coming over her<n>is clear, even through
her garbled<n>words.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! This... cathartic feeling... I've<n>never felt like
this before...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I... beat my two idols... The ones I've<n>admired for
so long...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I never imagined I could do it myself.<n>That's why I
always turned to my<n>oshis...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: But now... I...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wh-whooooaaa! What are you<n>saying? I-I
am—me?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, I should give you a token of my<n>appreciation
for being my fan! How<n>does a strand of hair from
my tail<n>sound?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Caught up in the excitement of the<n>moment, Agnes
Digital tries to offer<n>me a baffling keepsake as I
pull her<n>to the winner's circle.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Th-th-th-thank you! I'm Agnes Digital!<n>And I'm...
actually just your typical<n>Umamusume fan...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: And... watching their behinds—I meanrunning behind them is what gotme here...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I hope you all get it! I'm no ordinary<n>runner, but I
am just an ordinary fan,<n>you know?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'm just so... thankful... to be a part of<n>such
majesty and to be able to cross<n>the finish line at
its head...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But the reason I was able to win<n>today is because
I'm not just me!<n>I'm the culmination of all the
runners<n>that I've ever met... Their very<n>essence...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
All of the Umamusume who helped<n>me grow won
this race for me today.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So... from the very bottom of my<n>heart... Thank you,
everyone...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Umamusume are... a hundred timesmore... a thousand times morespectacular than I thought when Iwas a mere fan.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Opera O...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Yes... Today, we experienced a<n>historical anomaly.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
In these poor conditions, I went on the<n>path best
known to me, and Doto<n>went on hers, but...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
For Digital, the entire track was hers.<n>And, due to
her wealth of experience,<n>she deftly chose the
easiest place to<n>set her feet.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It was a path shown to her by<n>numerous runners.
Her ability to<n>follow that path...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Is the proof that she is a true<n>all-rounder. For
today only, I<n>relinquish my crown.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
By the way, I know I won and all<n>today, but did
you guys see Opera O?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Isn't she great? Her short hair<n>sways so gallantly
with each step<n>she takes. And did you see how
her<n>eyes narrowed back in the final<n>stretch!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: And Doto's bag! It's so perfect onher! The way it swings when shemoves—kyah!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh! And also—even though she didn't<n>run
today—my cute classic-year oshi<n>too! I really hope
I can run with her on<n>dirt one day.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And there are still more and more<n>Umamusume
out there overflowing<n>with charm. With the
spotlight on me<n>now on this grand stage, I can't
waste this chance to talk about all of<n>them!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So, please, everyone, stick with me till<n>the end!
Woooo!

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text: Um, Agnes Digital... I think that's your<n>time!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Getting overexcited during her<n>speech, she winds
up losing control<n>of herself.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
But that's Agnes Digital. The staff<n>begin to tug the
amazing All-Rounder<n>off the stage when...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wait! Let me say one more thing! Just<n>one more
thing, pleeease!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I LOVE UMAMUSUMEEEEE!
